indications.text:
IGALMI is indicated for the acute treatment of agitation associated with schizophrenia or bipolar I or II
disorder in adults.
Limitations of Use
The safety and effectiveness of IGALMI have not been established beyond 24 hours from the first dose
[see Warnings and Precautions (5.4, 5.5)].
